---
title: "Page 6 - Discussion Page Variant"
id: "mod001-se01-sec04-sp06"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec04"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: True
---









## Discussion

_Add the core question or prompt that will drive the discussion._

---

## Context

_Provide any necessary background or framing to support the discussion._

---

## Perspectives to consider

_Outline any contrasting viewpoints or starting positions to help stimulate different angles of thought._

---

## How to engage

_Provide guidance on how learners should participate (e.g., "Post your initial response, then reply to two peers")._

---

## Extend your thinking

_Add a follow-up prompt to help learners deepen or extend the discussion after the initial exchange._

---





---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add framing for this comparison or multi-perspective view here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Perspective A
<!-- editable:start tab_1_content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add content for the first perspective or approach here._]
<!-- editable:end -->

## Perspective B
<!-- editable:start tab_2_content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add content for the second perspective or approach here._]
<!-- editable:end -->


:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a prompt for the learner to compare these views or decide which applies to their context._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this critical reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="critical"}
**Personal Reflection**

<!-- editable:start prompt -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec04-sp05.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 5 - Data Page Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec04-sp07.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 7 - Summary Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
